purpose: Compatibility mirror for legacy repository freeze-surface expectations
description: This manifest exists so that historical CI checks, audit tooling, and earlier repository layouts that referenced the freeze/ directory continue to resolve a freeze surface path without reintroducing legacy authority.
interpretation_rules: This file must not be interpreted as the canonical freeze authority
The canonical freeze declaration lives in release-integrity/freeze-surfaces.json
Repository authority resolution is defined by AUTHORITY.md
Historical freeze artifacts remain preserved under release-history/

security_model.goal: Prevent legacy path resurrection from becoming an implicit protocol authority surface
security_model.mitigation: Explicit compatibility classification and canonical authority declaration
